# ExtensionCodeRejection enumeration

The reason an extension error code was rejected by [`ValidateExtensionErrorCode`](./ErrorRegistry/ValidateExtensionErrorCode.md).

```csharp
public enum ExtensionCodeRejection
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NotAnInteger | `0` | The candidate value was not an integer (R-22.7-a). |
| CollidesWithReserved | `1` | The candidate integer collides with one of the reserved codes (R-22.7-c). |
